text.title: Solo-Scale Affiliate Program Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: MRR ≥ $5K AND billing supports affiliate built-in AND founder time available?

branch.when: mrr_usd >= 5000 AND platform_supports_affiliate == true AND founder_bandwidth_hours_week >= 2
